Everybody disagrees and nobody just
commits. People just, you know, change,
change. People don't like change. They
don't want to change. Okay, I'm not
going to change. Like, oh, I don't
really believe in this idea. I'm not
going to do it. I'm not going to
implement it. You guys can do it, right?
Like,
>> so I think the idea of like what Amazon
taught me is like even if it's a really
bad idea, even if it's the worst idea,
right, and it's horrible and everything
falls apart and it collapses and it's,
you know, detrimental, like just do the
idea. We'll all agree on it. And what
will we come out of it? will come out of
it learning something new.
>> Yeah.
>> But you won't what you won't get out of
it is you won't if you didn't do it, you
would have never learned something new.
